subcodes.first_line: O friends of Abdul-Baha! From the letter of his honor Habibullah, boundless joy was obtained, expressing fervor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء از نامه جناب حبیب الله سرور بیمنتهی حصول یافت ناطق بالتهاب
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @love of God
